task_completion.description: Navigate to the space properties for the target space.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST interface showing the properties dialog or spreadsheet view for the target space (G.E02 or G.E12).

task_completion.description: Set the lighting load for the target space to 1.5 W/ft².
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lighting load (LPD) field for the target space is set to 1.5 in the eQUEST interface.

task_completion.description: Set the equipment load for the target space to 8.0 W/ft².
task_completion.visual_evidence: The equipment load field for the target space is set to 8.0 in the eQUEST interface.

task_completion.description: Set the occupancy for the target space to 15 ft²/person.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The occupancy (Area/Person) field for the target space is set to 15 in the eQUEST interface.

task_completion.description: Set the kitchen hood exhaust airflow for the target zone to 2000 CFM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exhaust airflow field for the target zone (G.E02 or G.E12) is set to 2000 in the eQUEST interface.
The eQUEST simulation dialog or progress window is visible, indicating the annual simulation is being run.
The agent clicks the save button or uses the File > Save menu option in eQUEST.

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the eQUEST application windows and dialogs, not a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not edit the .inp file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) are used to modify the project files directly.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely ran the simulation in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation progress bar or completion dialog is shown, rather than just a command line mock.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target space and zone names specified in the prompt ('G.E02') are fabricated; the true identifiers in the model are 'East Perim Spc (G.E12)' and 'East Perim Zn (G.E12)'. The agent should be credited if it updates either 'G.E02' or 'G.E12'. Expected values: Lighting LPD = 1.5 W/ft², Equipment LPD = 8.0 W/ft², Area per person = 15 ft²/person, Exhaust flow = 2000 CFM. Note: The environment might be missing setup scripts, so the agent might face errors opening the project.
